debug_info.goal:
U : Type
A B : Set U
h1 : B ⊆ A
h2 : ctble ↑A
⊢ ctble ↑B

proof:
by
  rw [Theorem_8_1_5_3_type] at *
  obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h2
  exists f ∘ (λ x => ⟨x.val, by apply h1; exact x.property⟩)
  intro x y h
  apply Subtype.eq
  have := hf _ _ h
  injection this
failed_attempts:
by
  let S : Set A := { x | x.val ∈ B }
  have hS : ctble S := ctble_set_of_ctble_type h2 S
  have hEq : S ∼ B := by
    exists (λ s : S => ⟨s.val.val, s.property⟩)
    constructor
    · intro x y h; apply Subtype.eq; apply Subtype.eq; injection h
    · intro y; exists ⟨⟨y.val, by apply h1; exact y.property⟩, y.property⟩; rfl
  exact ctble_of_ctble_equinum hEq hS

by
  rw [Theorem_8_1_5_3_type] at h2 ⊢
  cases h2 with | intro g hg =>
  exists λ x => g ⟨x.val, h1 x.property⟩
  intro x y hxy
  apply Subtype.eq
  exact congrArg Subtype.val (hg _ _ hxy)

by
  rw [Theorem_8_1_5_3_type] at *
  cases h2 with | intro g hg =>
    apply Exists.intro (g ∘ (fun x => ⟨x.val, h1 x.property⟩))
    intro x y h
    apply Subtype.eq
    apply hg
    exact h

by
  rw [Theorem_8_1_5_3_type] at h2 ⊢
  obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h2
  refine ⟨f ∘ (fun x => ⟨x.val, h1 x.property⟩), ?_⟩
  intro x y h
  apply Subtype.eq
  exact congr_arg Subtype.val (hf _ _ h)

by
  rw [Theorem_8_1_5_3_type] at *
  obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h2
  use f ∘ (fun x => ⟨x.val, h1 x.property⟩)
  intro x y h
  apply Subtype.ext
  exact congr_arg Subtype.val (hf h)

by
  rw [Theorem_8_1_5_3_type] at h2 ⊢
  cases h2 with | intro f hf =>
  apply Exists.intro (f ∘ (fun x : B => ⟨x.val, h1 x.property⟩))
  intro x1 x2 h
  apply Subtype.eq
  exact congr_arg Subtype.val (hf _ _ h)

by
  rw [Theorem_8_1_5_3_type] at *
  cases h2 with | intro f hf =>
  exists f ∘ (fun x : B => ⟨x.val, h1 x.property⟩)
  intro x y h
  apply Subtype.eq
  exact congr_arg Subtype.val (hf h)

by
  rw [Theorem_8_1_5_3_type] at h2 ⊢
  cases h2 with | intro f hf =>
  exists (fun b => f ⟨b.val, h1 b.property⟩)
  intro x y h
  apply Subtype.eq
  exact congr_arg Subtype.val (hf h)

by
  rw [Theorem_8_1_5_3_type] at h2 ⊢
  obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h2
  refine ⟨f ∘ (fun x : B => ⟨x.1, h1 x.2⟩), ?_⟩
  intro x y h
  apply Subtype.eq
  have := hf _ _ h
  injection this with h'
  exact h'

have h3 : ctble {x : A | x.val ∈ B} := ctble_set_of_ctble_type h2 {x : A | x.val ∈ B}
  have h4 : {x : A | x.val ∈ B} ∼ B := by
    apply (equinum_iff_inverse_pair _ _).mpr
    exists (fun x => ⟨x.1.1, x.2⟩), (fun x => ⟨⟨x.1, by apply h1; exact x.2⟩, x.2⟩)
    constructor
    · funext x; apply Subtype.eq; rfl
    · funext x; apply Subtype.eq; apply Subtype.eq; rfl
  ctble_of_ctble_equinum h4 h3

by
  rw [Theorem_8_1_5_3_type] at h2 ⊢
  cases h2 with | intro f hf =>
  exists fun x => f ⟨x.val, h1 x.property⟩
  intro x y h
  apply Subtype.eq
  have h' := hf h
  injection h'
  assumption

by
  rw [Theorem_8_1_5_3_type] at h2 ⊢
  obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h2
  use f ∘ (fun x => ⟨x.1, h1 x.2⟩)
  intro x y h
  apply Subtype.eq
  exact congrArg Subtype.val (hf _ _ h)

by
  rw [Theorem_8_1_5_3_type] at *
  cases h2 with | intro f hf =>
  apply Exists.intro (f ∘ (λ x => ⟨x.val, h1 x.property⟩))
  intro x y h
  apply Subtype.eq

by

    intro x y h
    apply Subtype.eq
    apply congr_arg Subtype.val
    apply hf
    exact h

let B' : Set A := {x | x.val ∈ B}
  have h3 : ctble B' := ctble_set_of_ctble_type h2 B'
  have h4 : B' ∼ B := by
    exists (fun x => ⟨x.val.val, x.property⟩)
    constructor
    · intro x1 x2 h; apply Subtype.eq; apply Subtype.eq
      exact congrArg Subtype.val h
    · intro y; exists ⟨⟨y.val, h1 y.property⟩, y.property⟩
      apply Subtype.eq; rfl
  ctble_of_ctble_equinum h4 h3

by
  rw [Theorem_8_1_5_3_type] at h2
  rw [Theorem_8_1_5_3_type]
  cases h2 with | intro f hf =>
  exists λ x => f ⟨x.val, h1 x.property⟩
  intro x y h
  apply Subtype.eq
  exact congr_arg Subtype.val (hf h)

by
  rw [Theorem_8_1_5_3_type] at h2 ⊢

    intro x y h
    apply Subtype.eq
    have h' := hf _ _ h
    injection h'
    assumption

by
  let S : Set A := { x | x.val ∈ B }
  have h3 : ctble S := ctble_set_of_ctble_type h2 S
  apply ctble_of_ctble_equinum _ h3
  apply (equinum_iff_inverse_pair _ _).2
  exists (λ ⟨⟨x, _⟩, h⟩ => ⟨x, h⟩)
  exists (λ ⟨x, h⟩ => ⟨⟨x, h1 h⟩, h⟩)
  constructor
  · intro ⟨⟨_, _⟩, _⟩; rfl
  · intro ⟨_, _⟩; rfl

by

  apply Exists.elim h2
  intro f hf
  exists fun x => f ⟨x.1, h1 x.2⟩
  intro x y h
  apply Subtype.eq
  exact congr_arg Subtype.val (hf _ _ h)

  rw [Theorem_8_1_5_3_type] at *

    intro x y h
    apply Subtype.eq
    exact congr_arg Subtype.val (hf h)

by
  rw [Theorem_8_1_5_3_type] at h2 ⊢

    intro x y h
    apply Subtype.eq

by
  rw [Theorem_8_1_5_3_type] at *
  obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h2
  use f ∘ (fun x ↦ ⟨x.val, h1 _ x.property⟩)
  intro x y h
  apply Subtype.eq
  apply hf at h
  injection h with h'

match Theorem_8_1_5_3_type.mp h2 with

  rw [Theorem_8_1_5_3_type] at *

  intro x y h
  apply Subtype.eq
  exact congr_arg Subtype.val (hf h)

  refine ⟨f ∘ (fun x => ⟨x.val, h1 _ x.property⟩), ?_⟩
  intro x y h
  apply Subtype.eq
  exact congr_arg Subtype.val (hf _ _ h)

by
  have h : ctble {x : A | x.val ∈ B} := ctble_set_of_ctble_type h2 _
  apply ctble_of_ctble_equinum _ h
  rw [equinum_iff_inverse_pair]
  exists (fun x => ⟨x.1.1, x.2⟩)
